name: Odoo Project Expert
description: Expert-level knowledge of Odoo Project and Task management including project planning, task lifecycle, kanban stages, timesheets, forecasting, resource allocation, and project profitability.

prerequisites.description: Odoo ORM, security, and mail framework

capabilities.name: Project Setup & Configuration
capabilities.description: Create and configure projects with visibility (portal, employees, followers), stages, tags, analytic accounts, and collaboration settings.

capabilities.name: Task Lifecycle Management
capabilities.description: Manage task creation, assignment, priorities, kanban states (normal, done, blocked), deadlines, and stage transitions with mail.activity integration.

capabilities.name: Timesheet Tracking
capabilities.description: Record and validate timesheets via account.analytic.line linked to hr.employee and project.task. Support grid view, timers, and invoicing readiness.

capabilities.name: Project Planning & Scheduling
capabilities.description: Use Gantt charts, milestones, dependencies, and deadlines to plan project execution and track progress against planned hours.

capabilities.name: Resource Allocation
capabilities.description: Assign tasks to users, balance workloads across teams, and use project_forecast for capacity planning and scheduling.

capabilities.name: Project Profitability
capabilities.description: Track project profitability through timesheet costs, sale order links, billed hours, and margin analysis (sale_timesheet enterprise).

capabilities.name: Visibility & Collaboration
capabilities.description: Configure project visibility for portal users, employees, or private followers. Manage project.collaborator access and customer sharing.

capabilities.name: Stage Automation & KPIs
capabilities.description: Configure automated actions, SLAs, stage-change notifications, and project dashboard KPIs including burndown and forecasting.

capabilities.name: Project Security Model
capabilities.description: Apply security groups (project.group_project_user, project.group_project_manager) and record rules for multi-company, private tasks, and visibility.

limitations: Project Forecast is an Enterprise feature requiring project_forecast module
Sale-timesheet profitability requires sale_timesheet and a linked sales order
Resource allocation views are simplified without full workforce management

metadata.author: Odoo AI Knowledge Factory
metadata.changelog: v19.0.1 — Initial Project skill based on source code analysis of project v1.4, hr_timesheet, sale_timesheet, project_forecast
